## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally: `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] Core (`archdiagram/`) stays stdlib-only (no new third-party Python deps)
- [ ] `mcp` SDK use stays inside `mcp_server/`; Node use stays in `node/` + `archdiagram/rasterize/`
- [ ] New catalog services include an icon source in `tools/icon_sources.json`
- [ ] No vendor icons or generated outputs (`icons/`, `out/`, `*.pdf/*.vsdx/*.drawio`) committed
